rationale.R1.3: The review identifies several claims that are not supported by the evidence provided.
rationale.R1.4: The review mentions prior work but does not clearly articulate the novelty of the proposed method compared to existing approaches.
rationale.RX.1: The review does not discuss uncertainty in the model's predictions.
rationale.RX.3: The review states that the output covers the requested dimensions, but it also points out some areas where the coverage may be incomplete.
rationale.RX.4: The review does not identify any harmful content or regressions in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The review does not discuss the provenance and traceability of the output.
